{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201258470B43A3313D6062B07703\"}"},"total":913},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540173811282363161","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的发挥了观影体特有的优点，虽然细节上略有缺漏，但大体上文笔饱满，笔风独特。可以看到作者也有在尽力弥补缺漏的部分，希望本书能持续更新下去。","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":6,"text":"观影体","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398272762B07703%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227540173811282363161%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227458902867059936280%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%82%E5%BD%B1%E4%BD%93%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755591527,"group_id":"7458902867059936280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6OsSaRcx9s5kO0qKbn3h1+65+e+lyGxuLw3ibbW+aNY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f670dd1744d445d2bdc7f6dbbadf3a41~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776537603\u0026x-signature=lFXXGlPB6G5HepuNVUvVzQvW4JA%3D","user_id":"1494934958653132","user_name":"凡人，上前觐见！"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1494934958653132","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7458902867059936280","book_info":{"abstract":"【崩铁】+【直播】+【天幕】+【综漫】一道光幕跨越无数宇宙的屏障投射到诸天万界，被各个世界的原住民强势围观！当镜流把刃细细切做臊子时，鬼杀队的众人惊了！“我去这是什么呼吸法？冰之呼吸？”（某鬼王在角落里瑟瑟发抖）当黄泉在匹诺康尼一刀砍出奇观时，某舰船上一个叫芽衣的少女饭勺都拿不稳了。“她也叫芽衣？她也是雷属性？还有……她声音为毛和我一模一样啊？”不妙啊！总感觉接下来的画面会出现不能接受的超展开啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/251479083eb5292cd7a16d27e6996e6c","author":"沐子休","author_id":"","book_id":"7458902867059936280","book_name":"综漫：给万界一点小小的崩铁震撼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0c8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":718,\"name\":\"动漫衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718\u0026name=动漫衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":71,\"name\":\"诸天万界\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71\u0026name=诸天万界\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":69,\"name\":\"直播\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69\u0026name=直播\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":465,\"name\":\"综漫\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465\u0026name=综漫\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1079,\"name\":\"衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079\u0026name=衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7458902913960657432","read_count":"83877","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2098054"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1000","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,直播,诸天万界,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3c4bb5b57ffd52d546aa00880bdcce94~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779166727\u0026x-signature=9QESkFTFHj1VnsYYNa0W0a%2FQy%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{}
